title: Package Workflow Compression Follow-Ups
goal: Implement issues #380 through #386 by making the existing report, defaults, summary, and reconciliation surfaces reduce workflow cognitive load while preserving package portability.
non_goals: Make GitHub or any host tracker part of shipped package semantics.
Treat narrow direct work as requiring full planning ceremony.

intent.outcome: Agents can cheaply decide direct vs planned workflow, preserve friction as product signal, inspect package-use and intent-satisfaction closeout evidence, see external-work deltas, and avoid expanding first-contact surfaces.
intent.constraints: Keep the shipped package repo-, language-, agent-, vendor-, and tracker-agnostic; implement through existing compact surfaces where possible.
intent.latitude: Choose compact field names and report/defaults placement that match current contracts.
intent.escalation: Stop before host-specific workflow automation or another permanent first-contact surface.

execution.next_step: No required continuation; reopen only on fresh dogfooding friction.
execution.proof: Selected workspace CLI and planning-surface proof commands passed.

invariants: Core package consumes provider-agnostic external work evidence.
Surface growth pressure must prefer compression over new durable surfaces.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Make the package easier to enter, recover, verify, and trust by reducing protocol overhead and capitalizing on continuity/proof strengths.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: new issues only if validation or dogfooding reveals additional friction

required_continuation.activation trigger: fresh dogfooding friction after this slice

active_milestone.scope: Implement compact package workflow compression signals for issues #380-#386.

immediate_next_action: Run the selected proof commands, then close #380-#386 and archive this plan if all checks pass.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py src/agentic_workspace/contracts/report_contract.json src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/workspace_report.schema.json tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/package-workflow-compression-followups-2026-04-26.plan.json .agentic-workspace/system-intent/intent.toml --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: #380-#386 have shipped compact report/defaults/planning behavior or are explicitly represented as provider-agnostic evidence.
The active plan records package workflow use and intent satisfaction before closeout.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Compact existing package surfaces now distinguish direct/light/execplan workflow shape, expose friction capture guidance, show closeout package-use and intent-satisfaction checks, route external-work deltas, and warn against first-contact surface growth.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: no new command or host-specific ingest automation
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning doctor, planning surface check, reconcile, summary/report dogfooding

intent_interpretation.literal request: Create issues for all of your suggestions, then implement them.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Turn dogfooding findings into tracked product improvements and land the compact package changes now.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that the changes reduce protocol overhead without adding a new first-contact surface.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Workspace CLI/reporting code, report contract, focused tests, planning state/evidence/execplan.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q -k "execution_shape or closeout_trust or operational_compression or friction_capture or external_work_delta or surface_value"; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Large CLI extraction or adding a new command.

stop_conditions.stop when: #380-#386 are implemented, tested, closed, and planning evidence is reconciled.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A suggestion cannot be addressed without a new command or host-specific package assumption.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Work expands into unrelated product-compression cleanup.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Focused validation exposes broader contract mismatch.

context_budget.live working set: report/defaults CLI functions, focused tests, this execplan, #380-#386
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run and closeout_distillation before archive.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Continue from this execplan and focused report/defaults tests.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before broad reread or after validation failure.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay on the current branch and keep package semantics portable.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact compact field names and test placement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A workflow decision would require human process policy outside the package.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; gh issue list --state open --limit 50 --json number,title,labels,updatedAt,url
execution_run.what happened: Created #380-#386, promoted the implementation slice into checked-in planning, implemented compact report/defaults signals, and archived the plan after proof.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace report/defaults code and contracts, focused CLI tests, planning evidence/state, system-intent mirror
execution_run.validations run: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --format json

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Issues #380-#386 are implemented through existing compact package surfaces without adding a new command.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: Focused and full workspace CLI tests passed; ruff passed; planning doctor/checks/reconcile/report were dogfooded.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Provider-agnostic external evidence records #380-#386 as closed and this archived execplan preserves proof.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (memory/docs/config): No memory, docs, or config promotion needed; behavior is in code/contracts/tests.

finished_run_review.config compliance: used package report, summary, proof, doctor, reconcile, and planning checks

discard.summary: Do not preserve chat-level implementation narration beyond this archived proof record.
